key_items: Michael Saylor/MicroStrategy teasing resumption of Bitcoin purchases after pause
CFTC approval of Bitcoin perpetual futures with institutional adoption (Kraken launch within month)
Bitcoin consolidation at key support with technical setup for 10-20% breakout move this week
reasoning: Bitcoin is consolidating at strong holder cost-basis support with multiple institutional bullish catalysts emerging: MicroStrategy appears ready to resume large-scale accumulation, regulatory clarity via CFTC perp approval opens new institutional channels, and technical analysis suggests 114-day consolidation ready to resolve. The $1B Iran crypto seizure and potential Trump Bitcoin reserve add forward-looking support.
risks: Elevated inflation data (PCE at 3.8% YoY) could trigger Fed policy concerns and risk-off sentiment; Bitcoin closing May down 3.5% shows current momentum weakness; JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon publicly opposing crypto clarity act signals banking sector resistance to institutional adoption.
